noteIconSvg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="100" height="100">
  <!-- 屋顶 - 三角形 -->
  <polygon points="50,10 10,40 90,40" fill="#E67E22" stroke="#D35400" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- 墙壁 - 矩形 -->
  <rect x="10" y="40" width="80" height="50" fill="#FDF2E9" stroke="#BDC3C7" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- 门 - 矩形 -->
  <rect x="40" y="60" width="20" height="30" fill="#6E2C00" stroke="#4A1A00" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>

  <!-- 门把手 - 圆形 -->
  <circle cx="55" cy="75" r="2.5" fill="#F1C40F"/>

  <!-- 窗户 - 左 -->
  <rect x="18" y="50" width="15" height="15" fill="#AED6F1" stroke="#5D6D7E" stroke-width="1.5" rx="1"/>
  <!-- 窗户玻璃反光 - 左 -->
  <line x1="18" y1="50" x2="33" y2="65" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="18" y1="65" x2="33" y2="50" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- 窗户 - 右 -->
  <rect x="67" y="50" width="15" height="15" fill="#AED6F1" stroke="#5D6D7E" stroke-width="1.5" rx="1"/>
  <!-- 窗户玻璃反光 - 右 -->
  <line x1="67" y1="50" x2="82" y2="65" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="67" y1="65" x2="82" y2="50" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
